title.en: MACsec Reference Annexes: EDE Conformance, Multi-SC MKA, Interoperability & MIB Revisions
title.zh: MACsec 参考附录：EDE 一致性、多 SC 的 MKA、互操作性与 MIB 修订

blocks.en: The last four annexes of IEEE Std 802.1AE-2018 are the reference shelf of the standard. They are not new protocol — they tell you how to prove a product conforms, how to run the key-agreement protocol when one device protects several traffic classes, how different security boxes interoperate without stepping on each other, and why the management database changed. We will define every acronym as it appears. MACsec = Media Access Control Security, the link-layer encryption framework. An EDE = Ethernet Data Encryption device, a standalone two-port box that adds MACsec to a link without the attached equipment knowing. A SecY = MAC Security Entity, the block inside a port that actually encrypts and decrypts. SC = Secure Channel, a one-way protected flow. MKA = MACsec Key Agreement, the protocol that distributes keys.
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.1AE-2018 的最后四个附录是该标准的参考资料库。它们不是新的协议，而是告诉你：如何证明某个产品符合标准、当一台设备保护多个流量类别时如何运行密钥协商协议、不同的安全设备之间如何互操作而不互相干扰，以及管理数据库为何发生了变化。我们会在每个缩写首次出现时给出定义。MACsec = 介质访问控制安全（Media Access Control Security），即链路层加密框架。EDE = 以太网数据加密设备（Ethernet Data Encryption device），一个独立的双端口盒子，能在链路上加入 MACsec 而连接的设备毫不知情。SecY = MAC 安全实体（MAC Security Entity），端口内部真正负责加解密的模块。SC = 安全通道（Secure Channel），一条单向受保护的数据流。MKA = MACsec 密钥协商（MACsec Key Agreement），负责分发密钥的协议。

blocks.en: Annex D (normative) is the PICS proforma for an EDE. PICS = Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement: a fixed-format questionnaire a vendor fills in to declare exactly which capabilities and options it implemented (D.1). 'Normative' means it carries real conformance weight — it is the checklist a tester or buyer uses to predict interworking. Each row has an item reference, a feature question, a status symbol (M = mandatory, O = optional, O.n = pick at least one in group n, X = prohibited), a pointer back to the body clause, and a Support box to tick (D.2, D.3). Some items are conditional, written 'predicate: M', meaning the row only applies if another ticked item makes the predicate true (D.3.4).
blocks.zh: 附录 D（规范性）是 EDE 的 PICS 形式表。PICS = 协议实现一致性声明（Protocol Implementation Conformance Statement）：供应商填写的固定格式问卷，用以声明它究竟实现了哪些能力和选项（D.1）。“规范性”意味着它具有真正的一致性效力——它是测试方或采购方用来预测互通性的核对表。每一行包含：条目编号、特性问题、状态符号（M = 强制，O = 可选，O.n = 同一编号 n 组内至少选一项，X = 禁止）、指回正文条款的引用，以及一个待勾选的支持栏（D.2、D.3）。某些条目是条件性的，写作“谓词: M”，表示只有当另一个已勾选条目使该谓词为真时，本行才适用（D.3.4）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 520 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="20" width="70" height="80"/><rect x="80" y="20" width="230" height="80"/><rect x="310" y="20" width="90" height="80"/><rect x="400" y="20" width="110" height="80"/><text x="45" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Item</text><text x="45" y="70" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">EDEM*</text><text x="195" y="55" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Feature question</text><text x="355" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Status</text><text x="355" y="62" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">M / O / O.n</text><text x="355" y="78" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">pred: M</text><text x="455" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Support</text><text x="455" y="62" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Yes [ ]</text><text x="455" y="78" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">N/A [ ]</text><text x="10" y="14" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="9">PICS proforma row (Annex D)</text></svg>

caption.en: One row of the Annex D PICS questionnaire: item reference (an asterisk marks items used in predicates), the feature question, the status symbol, the clause reference, and the Support box the supplier ticks.
caption.zh: 附录 D 的 PICS 问卷中的一行：条目编号（带星号表示该条目被用于谓词中）、特性问题、状态符号、条款引用，以及供应商勾选的支持栏。

summary.en: Annex D coverage map — the EDE PICS sections D.1 to D.9
summary.zh: 附录 D 覆盖图 —— EDE 的 PICS 各节 D.1 至 D.9

blocks.en: D.1 introduces the proforma and its four uses (implementor checklist, supplier/acquirer capability statement, user interworking check, tester basis). D.2 lists the status symbols (M, O, O.n, X) and predicate notation (¬ = logical negation). D.3 gives completion rules: D.3.1 structure, D.3.2 Additional Information (Ai items), D.3.3 Exception Information (Xi items — note: requiring an Exception means the implementation does NOT conform), D.3.4 conditional status and predicates (OR / AND combinations). D.4 is the actual proforma: D.4.1 implementation identification, D.4.2 protocol summary. D.5 is EDE type and common requirements — the O.1 group choosing exactly one of EDE-M / EDE-CS / EDE-CC / EDE-SS, plus mandatory TWOP (two ports, red-side and black-side) and SECY (an MKA-capable PAE per SecY). PAE = Port Access Entity. D.6 EDE-M configuration, D.7 EDE-CS, D.8 EDE-CC, D.9 EDE-SS — each ties its rows to body clauses 5.6–5.9 and 15.2–15.7.
blocks.zh: D.1 介绍该形式表及其四种用途（实现者核对表、供应商/采购方能力声明、用户互通性检查、测试方依据）。D.2 列出状态符号（M、O、O.n、X）及谓词记号（¬ = 逻辑非）。D.3 给出填写规则：D.3.1 结构、D.3.2 附加信息（Ai 条目）、D.3.3 例外信息（Xi 条目——注意：需要例外即意味着该实现不符合标准）、D.3.4 条件状态与谓词（OR / AND 组合）。D.4 是正式的形式表：D.4.1 实现标识、D.4.2 协议摘要。D.5 是 EDE 类型与共同要求——O.1 组要求在 EDE-M / EDE-CS / EDE-CC / EDE-SS 中恰好选一种，外加强制项 TWOP（两个端口，红侧与黑侧）和 SECY（每个 SecY 配一个支持 MKA 的 PAE）。PAE = 端口访问实体（Port Access Entity）。D.6 为 EDE-M 配置、D.7 为 EDE-CS、D.8 为 EDE-CC、D.9 为 EDE-SS——每节都将其各行与正文条款 5.6–5.9 及 15.2–15.7 关联。

blocks.en: Annex E (informative) explains how MKA runs when one SecY uses multiple transmit SCs — one per traffic class. 'Informative' means it is tutorial guidance, not a conformance requirement: clause 7.1.2 already says each SCI (Secure Channel Identifier) is represented by a separate MKA participant that exchanges MKPDUs (MKA Protocol Data Units) as if it were a separate SecY in the same CA (Connectivity Association). All participants share the same CAK (Connectivity Association Key), named by the same CKN (CAK Name), so there is no extra authentication and no extra group-key distribution. A KaY (the entity that does Key Agreement) can either instantiate genuinely separate participants, or — the trick Annex E recommends — mimic several participants inside one, keeping a single CP (Controlled Port) state machine and one Live/Potential Peers List.
blocks.zh: 附录 E（资料性）说明当一个 SecY 使用多个发送 SC（每个流量类别一个）时，MKA 如何运行。“资料性”意味着这是教学性指导，而非一致性要求：条款 7.1.2 已规定每个 SCI（安全通道标识符，Secure Channel Identifier）由一个独立的 MKA 参与者表示，它收发 MKPDU（MKA 协议数据单元），就像它是同一 CA（连接关联，Connectivity Association）中的一个独立 SecY 一样。所有参与者共享同一个 CAK（连接关联密钥，Connectivity Association Key），并由同一个 CKN（CAK 名称）标识，因此不需要额外的认证，也不需要额外的组密钥分发。KaY（执行密钥协商的实体）既可以真正实例化多个独立参与者，也可以采用附录 E 推荐的技巧——在一个参与者内部模拟多个参与者，从而只保留一个 CP（受控端口，Controlled Port）状态机以及一份活跃/潜在对端列表。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD KaY[KaY: one Key Agreement entity] --> P0[Default-class participant
advertises Key Server] KaY --> P1[Class-1 participant
Key Server Priority 0xFF] KaY --> P2[Class-2 participant
Key Server Priority 0xFF] P0 --> CP[Single CP state machine
one Peers List] P1 --> CP P2 --> CP CP --> TX[CP:TRANSMIT enables all
traffic-class transmit SAs]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD KaY[KaY：一个密钥协商实体] --> P0[默认类别参与者
通告为密钥服务器] KaY --> P1[类别1参与者
密钥服务器优先级 0xFF] KaY --> P2[类别2参与者
密钥服务器优先级 0xFF] P0 --> CP[单一 CP 状态机
一份对端列表] P1 --> CP P2 --> CP CP --> TX[CP:TRANSMIT 启用所有
流量类别的发送 SA]

summary.en: Annex E coverage map — single-participant emulation of multiple SCs
summary.zh: 附录 E 覆盖图 —— 用单参与者模拟多个 SC

blocks.en: Annex E (pages 230–231 of the PDF, citing body clause 7.1.2 and cross-referencing IEEE Std 802.1X) details the single-implementation approach: each participant uses a separate MI (Member Identifier) and its own MN (Message Number); a new MI is checked against co-resident participants. The KaY keeps one Live Peers List and one Potential Peers List; when a participant transmits an MKPDU, its co-resident participants are added to the transmitted Live Peer List. Only the default-traffic-class participant advertises as a potential Key Server (others advertise priority 0xFF) and only it distributes keys (referencing IEEE Std 802.1X-2010 9.5). In the CP state machine, RECEIVE-state createSAs(lki) covers receive SAs from other CA members plus the co-resident transmit SAs (no receive SAs instantiated for the latter); the 'electedSelf' transition out of CP:RECEIVING is taken by the default participant; CP:TRANSMIT enables all traffic-class group transmit SAs; the retireWhen timer in CP:TRANSMITTING handles a preempted frame arriving after a preempting frame, legitimate when strict replay protection is not enforced.
blocks.zh: 附录 E（PDF 第 230–231 页，引用正文条款 7.1.2 并交叉引用 IEEE Std 802.1X）详述了单一实现方法：每个参与者使用独立的 MI（成员标识符，Member Identifier）和各自的 MN（消息编号，Message Number）；新选的 MI 要与同驻参与者比对。KaY 只维护一份活跃对端列表和一份潜在对端列表；当某参与者发送 MKPDU 时，其同驻参与者会被加入所发送的活跃对端列表。只有默认流量类别参与者通告为潜在密钥服务器（其余通告优先级 0xFF），也只有它分发密钥（引用 IEEE Std 802.1X-2010 的 9.5）。在 CP 状态机中，RECEIVE 状态的 createSAs(lki) 涵盖来自其他 CA 成员的接收 SA 以及同驻的发送 SA（后者不实例化接收 SA）；离开 CP:RECEIVING 的“electedSelf”转移由默认参与者触发；CP:TRANSMIT 启用所有流量类别组的发送 SA；CP:TRANSMITTING 中的 retireWhen 定时器处理被抢占帧在抢占帧之后到达的情况，在不强制严格防重放时这是合法的。

blocks.en: Annex F (informative) is about interoperability and the PAE addresses that scope it. The key idea: it is the destination MAC address — not the protocol EtherType, not the kind of bridge sending it — that decides how far a control frame propagates, because each bridge type filters a small set of group 'Reserved Addresses' defined by IEEE Std 802.1Q. So an EDE chooses the destination address of its EAPOL (Extensible Authentication Protocol over LAN) frames to match the desired CA scope. Pick a Nearest non-TPMR Bridge address (TPMR = Two-Port MAC Relay) and the CA stays on one LAN segment; pick a Nearest Customer Bridge address and it can stretch across a PBN (Provider Bridged Network). Pick the wrong one and you can accidentally create a CA that swallows a bridge, whose own BPDUs (Bridge Protocol Data Units) then get encrypted and become indecipherable.
blocks.zh: 附录 F（资料性）讲述互操作性以及为其界定范围的 PAE 地址。核心思想是：决定一个控制帧传播多远的，是目的 MAC 地址——而非协议的 EtherType，也不是发送它的网桥类型——因为每种网桥按 IEEE Std 802.1Q 定义的一小组“保留地址”进行过滤。因此 EDE 会选择其 EAPOL（基于局域网的可扩展认证协议，Extensible Authentication Protocol over LAN）帧的目的地址来匹配期望的 CA 范围。选用“最近的非 TPMR 网桥”地址（TPMR = 双端口 MAC 中继，Two-Port MAC Relay），CA 就被限制在一个 LAN 网段内；选用“最近的客户网桥”地址，它就能延伸跨越一个 PBN（运营商桥接网络，Provider Bridged Network）。如果选错，你可能意外地创建出一个把某网桥包进去的 CA，于是该网桥自己的 BPDU（网桥协议数据单元，Bridge Protocol Data Unit）会被加密而变得无法解读。

blocks.en: Mnemonic for Annex F: 'scope follows the destination address.' Table F-1 is the cheat sheet — e.g. EDE-CC ↔ EDE-CC across a PBN uses the EDE-CC PEP Address 01-80-C2-00-00-1F; two EDE-Ms on a plain LAN use Nearest non-TPMR Bridge 01-80-C2-00-00-03; the EDE-SS PEP Address is 01-80-C2-00-00-0B. The EDE-SS deliberately must NOT reuse the EDE-CS address, to guard against an unintended S-tag/C-tag swap.
blocks.zh: 附录 F 的记忆口诀：“范围由目的地址决定。”表 F-1 就是速查表——例如，跨 PBN 的 EDE-CC ↔ EDE-CC 使用 EDE-CC PEP 地址 01-80-C2-00-00-1F；普通 LAN 上的两个 EDE-M 使用“最近的非 TPMR 网桥”地址 01-80-C2-00-00-03；EDE-SS PEP 地址为 01-80-C2-00-00-0B。EDE-SS 特意不得复用 EDE-CS 的地址，以防止意外的 S-tag/C-tag 互换。

summary.en: Annex F coverage map — per-type address choices and Table F-1
summary.zh: 附录 F 覆盖图 —— 各类型的地址选择与表 F-1

blocks.en: Annex F (pages 232–234) walks through every EDE type. An EDE-M securing simple LAN connectivity uses Nearest non-TPMR (body 15.2); securing across a PBN it uses Nearest Customer Bridge (15.4), with caveats about C-tagged interfaces carrying multiple service instances discarding the EAPOL frames, and a worked example of two nested CAs both using the Nearest Customer Bridge address. An EDE-CS uses an address forwarded by S-VLAN components but filtered by C-VLAN components — Nearest Customer Bridge enables hub-and-spoke with EDE-Ms. An EDE-CC must use an address forwarded by PEBs (Provider Edge Bridges) carrying multiple service instances, ruling out the 802.1Q Reserved Addresses, hence the dedicated EDE-CC PEP Address 01-80-C2-00-00-1F. An EDE-SS shares EDE-CS filtering but must use a different, Reserved (non-Nearest-Customer-Bridge) address — the EDE-SS PEP Address 01-80-C2-00-00-0B. PEP = Provider Edge Port; PE = Provider Edge; PBBN = Provider Backbone Bridged Network. Table F-1 (page 234) tabulates system, peer system, connectivity, and recommended PAE address for each scenario.
blocks.zh: 附录 F（第 232–234 页）逐一讲解每种 EDE 类型。保护简单 LAN 连通性的 EDE-M 使用“最近的非 TPMR”（正文 15.2）；跨 PBN 保护时使用“最近的客户网桥”（15.4），并附带说明：承载多个服务实例的 C-tagged 接口会丢弃 EAPOL 帧，还给出两个均使用“最近的客户网桥”地址的嵌套 CA 的示例。EDE-CS 使用一个被 S-VLAN 组件转发但被 C-VLAN 组件过滤的地址——“最近的客户网桥”地址可与 EDE-M 实现星型（hub-and-spoke）组网。EDE-CC 必须使用一个能被承载多服务实例的 PEB（运营商边缘网桥，Provider Edge Bridge）转发的地址，这排除了 802.1Q 保留地址，因此采用专用的 EDE-CC PEP 地址 01-80-C2-00-00-1F。EDE-SS 的过滤要求与 EDE-CS 相同，但必须使用一个不同的、保留的（非“最近客户网桥”）地址——EDE-SS PEP 地址 01-80-C2-00-00-0B。PEP = 运营商边缘端口（Provider Edge Port）；PE = 运营商边缘；PBBN = 运营商骨干桥接网络（Provider Backbone Bridged Network）。表 F-1（第 234 页）针对每种场景列出系统、对端系统、连通方式及推荐的 PAE 地址。

blocks.en: Annex G (informative) explains why the management model changed. MIB = Management Information Base, the structured database a remote manager reads via SNMP. The original SecY MIB (MIB-2006, from IEEE Std 802.1AE-2006) went untouched until IEEE Std 802.1AEcg-2017 added per-traffic-class transmit SCs, so misordered frames within a class can be discarded and strict replay protection kept even when a Provider Bridged Network or IEEE 802.3 frame preemption reorders frames of different classes. That required new indexed tables (e.g. secyTSCTable, secyTSATable, secyIfTCTable, secyIfAPTable) and a fresh compliance statement (MIB-2016). Crucially, MKA now gives management visibility — for example a text-string Key Identifier shows whether two systems' SAKs (Secure Association Keys) match — so many old per-SA counters were deprecated rather than counted at packet rate. PCP = Priority Code Point.
blocks.zh: 附录 G（资料性）说明管理模型为何发生变化。MIB = 管理信息库（Management Information Base），远程管理者通过 SNMP 读取的结构化数据库。原始的 SecY MIB（MIB-2006，源自 IEEE Std 802.1AE-2006）一直未改动，直到 IEEE Std 802.1AEcg-2017 增加了按流量类别划分的发送 SC，从而能丢弃类别内乱序的帧，并在运营商桥接网络或 IEEE 802.3 帧抢占导致不同类别的帧重排时仍保持严格防重放。这需要新的带索引的表（如 secyTSCTable、secyTSATable、secyIfTCTable、secyIfAPTable）以及全新的合规声明（MIB-2016）。关键在于，MKA 如今提供了管理可见性——例如文本字符串形式的密钥标识符可显示两个系统的 SAK（安全关联密钥，Secure Association Key）是否匹配——因此许多旧的按 SA 计数器被弃用，而不再以分组速率进行计数。PCP = 优先级码点（Priority Code Point）。

summary.en: Annex G coverage map — counter and Cipher Suite changes (G.1, G.2)
summary.zh: 附录 G 覆盖图 —— 计数器与密码套件的变化（G.1、G.2）

blocks.en: The Annex G intro (page 235) frames MIB-2006 vs MIB-2016, noting Table 13-5 through 13-8 list current and deprecated objects, the new secyIfSCI / secyTSCTable / secyTSATable for multiple transmit SCs, and maintenance fixes (full extended PN and SSCI visible for XPN-capable Cipher Suites; the industry move to YANG may make these the last MIB changes). PN = Packet Number; XPN = eXtended Packet Number; SSCI = Short SCI. G.1 Counter changes (pages 236–237): real-time verification counts depend on validateFrames and can be reduced (NOTE 1 to Figure 10-4); generation counts derive from nextPN; secyTxSAStatsTable is removed (data retrievable from secyTSATable); per-SA receive counters drop away because secyTSAKeyIdentifier / secyRxSAKeyIdentifier and MKA convey SAK status, leaving only nextPN and lowestPN as required; several MIB-2006 counts are combined; explicit derivation formulas are given for secyStatsRxNoSAPkts, secyStatsErrNoSAPkts, and the RFC 2863 ifInErrors / ifInDiscards. G.2 Available Cipher Suites (page 237): MIB-2016 adds a per-Controlled-Port list (secyIfCipherEnableUse, secyIfCipherRqConfidentiality) indexing into secyCipherSuiteTable, and deprecates the RowStatus object since the system, not a network manager, determines which Cipher Suites are implemented.
blocks.zh: 附录 G 引言（第 235 页）对比 MIB-2006 与 MIB-2016，指出表 13-5 至 13-8 列出现行与已弃用对象、为多个发送 SC 新增的 secyIfSCI / secyTSCTable / secyTSATable，以及维护性修订（为支持 XPN 的密码套件公开完整扩展 PN 和 SSCI；业界转向 YANG 可能使这些成为该 MIB 的最后改动）。PN = 分组编号（Packet Number）；XPN = 扩展分组编号（eXtended Packet Number）；SSCI = 短 SCI（Short SCI）。G.1 计数器变化（第 236–237 页）：实时验证计数取决于 validateFrames，可被精简（图 10-4 的注 1）；生成计数可由 nextPN 推导；secyTxSAStatsTable 被移除（数据可从 secyTSATable 取得）；按 SA 的接收计数器被取消，因为 secyTSAKeyIdentifier / secyRxSAKeyIdentifier 与 MKA 已传达 SAK 状态，仅保留 nextPN 与 lowestPN 为必需；若干 MIB-2006 计数被合并；并给出 secyStatsRxNoSAPkts、secyStatsErrNoSAPkts 以及 RFC 2863 的 ifInErrors / ifInDiscards 的明确推导公式。G.2 可用密码套件（第 237 页）：MIB-2016 新增按受控端口的列表（secyIfCipherEnableUse、secyIfCipherRqConfidentiality）索引到 secyCipherSuiteTable，并弃用 RowStatus 对象，因为决定实现哪些密码套件的是系统而非网络管理员。

blocks.en: How the four annexes fit together: Annex D is the only normative one — it is the conformance contract. Annexes E, F, and G are informative background: E tells implementers how to build a multi-SC KaY cheaply, F tells deployers how to scope CAs with the right PAE address so security boxes interoperate, and G tells operators why the management MIB looks different and how to map old counters to new ones.
blocks.zh: 四个附录如何协同：附录 D 是唯一的规范性附录——它是一致性契约。附录 E、F、G 为资料性背景：E 告诉实现者如何低成本地构建多 SC 的 KaY；F 告诉部署者如何用正确的 PAE 地址界定 CA 范围，从而让安全设备互操作；G 告诉运营者管理 MIB 为何不同，以及如何把旧计数器映射到新计数器。

cites.note: Annex D (normative) PICS proforma for an EDE: D.1 uses, D.2 status symbols, D.3 completion rules and predicates, D.4 proforma, D.5 EDE type and common requirements, D.6-D.9 per-type configuration.

Annex E (informative) MKA operation for multiple transmit SCs: shared CAK/CKN, single-participant emulation, MI/MN, single CP state machine, default-class Key Server, CP:TRANSMIT and retireWhen behavior.
Annex F (informative) EDE interoperability and PAE addresses: destination address scoping, per-type address choices (15.2-15.7), and Table F-1 of scenarios with recommended PAE addresses.
Annex G (informative) Management and MIB revisions: MIB-2006 vs MIB-2016, multiple transmit SC tables, G.1 counter changes and derivation formulas, G.2 available Cipher Suites.
